briefdescription.para: Mask to extract 3 least significant bits from reference voltage.
Mask to extract 3 least significant bits from depth.
Mask to extract most significant bit from reference voltage.
Mask to extract 2 most significant bits from depth.
Shift value to place most significant bit of reference voltage.
Shift value to place 3 least significant bits of reference voltage.
Shift value to place 2 most significant bits of depth.
Shift value to place 3 least significant bits of depth.
Shift value to place bits of width.
Bit position of glitch detector1 status.

parameterdescription.para: Value to be written in register

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success error code on failure
XST_SUCCESS on success error code on failure
XST_SUCCESS on success error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (u8 Depth, u8 Width, u8 RefVoltage, u8 UserRegVal, u8 GlitchDetectorNum)
memberdef.name: XPlmi_ConfigureGlitchDetector

briefdescription.para: This function configures desired glitch detector.

parameterdescription.para: is the minimum voltage glitch detection depth
is the minimum glitch detector width
is the reference voltage for the glitch detector comparators
indicates to select the register values instead of the eFUSE values to configure the glitch detector
is the number of glitch detector to be configured

briefdescription.para: This function enables/disables the desired glitch detector.

parameterdescription.para: is the number of glitch detector to be enabled/disabled

briefdescription.para: This function reads the status of desired glitch detector.

parameterdescription.para: is the number of glitch detector whose status is to be read

briefdescription.para: This is the file which contains glitch detector code.

detaileddescription.para: This contains APIs for configuring glitch detector, enable/disable the glitch detector and to read the status of glitch detector. These APIs support both client and server mode for glitch detector0 and glitch detector1.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- ---------- -------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.00 pre 06/09/2024 Initial release pre 07/17/2024 Used register node to access PMC analog registers and fixed misrac warnings pre 10/19/2024 Added support for PL microblaze 1.01 abh 07/22/2025 Added doxygen tag 2.4 gnr 03/18/26 Updated the Payload assignments with XPLMI_PACK_PAYLOAD macros tbk 02/24/26 Added SMC support for client applications tbk 05/19/26 Unified response indexing; helper now handles SMC/mailbox shift
